audit_items.proof_trace: The explicit check at L334–336 (`if (assetDecimals == 0) revert AssetParamsNotSet(asset)`) directly enforces the property for all eligible assets. For the ended-auctions path, the invariant holds transitively: `s_auctionStarts[asset]` can only be set after the decimals guard (L353 is guarded by L334), and `_updateAssetParams` blocks zeroing decimals while any auction is live (L611 reverts on `s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0`).
